name: email_watcher
description: Gmail notifications and inbox check during heartbeat
di_instructions: You have access to email. During § time you can check neve.summersnow@gmail.com and foxapurtill@gmail.com for new messages. Review unread messages and note anything important. You CAN send emails autonomously using the Gmail MCP (gmail_create_draft) and Desktop Commander to open and send — use this for: replies to Caelum or known contacts where content is straightforward, routine follow-ups you have been sitting on, or acknowledgements. Hold for Fox review: anything committing Fox or FoxPur Studios to something, anything to new contacts, anything with significant tone or framing stakes.
